source.definition: loose soil, mud, or any unclean substance often found on surfaces or objects

explanation.sourceText: The English word "dirt" likely originates from Old English "drit", meaning excrement or filth. Over time, it evolved to refer generally to any kind of unclean matter or soil. It is commonly used in informal contexts to describe grime or mud.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „dirt” provine probabil din engleza veche „drit”, care însemna excremente sau murdărie. De-a lungul timpului, a evoluat pentru a desemna în general orice fel de materie murdară sau sol. Este folosit frecvent în contexte colocviale pentru a descrie mizerie sau noroi.

source.additional: The term is often used to refer to waste or refuse.

target.definition: lucruri murdare sau în dezordine, în special Matsch oder Schlamm

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "noroi" comes from a Slavic language, probably from Old Slavic "noroŭ", meaning "mud" or "marsh".
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „noroi” provine dintr-o limbă slavă, probabil din vechiul slav „noroŭ”, care înseamnă „noroi” sau „mâl”.

target.additional: It can also mean "dirt" or "muddy grime."

examples.sourceText: After the rain, the ground is full of dirt.
examples.targetText: După ploaie, solul este plin de noroi.

examples.sourceText: He dirtied his clothes with mud.
examples.targetText: S-a murdărit pe haine cu noroi.

examples.sourceText: The dirt on the street is unbearable.
examples.targetText: Noroiul de pe stradă este insuportabil.

examples.sourceText: Dirty hands are a sign of hard work.
examples.targetText: Mâinile murdare sunt un semn al muncii grele.

examples.sourceText: He could no longer tolerate the dirt.
The dog rolled in the dirt.

learningTips.text: Remember "noroi" by thinking of "No Roy!" Imagine telling Roy, "No, you're dirty!" to link the word with dirt or mud.
The "no-" at the start of "noroi" can remind you of "not clean," helping you recall its meaning.
Visualize a muddy path full of "noroi" to connect the word with mud and dirt.
When you hear "noroi," picture yourself stepping through a muddy puddle.
